It's National Give Something Away Day, {{first_name}}!

Did you know women's bra sizes can change six times during their lives? Weight changes, pregnancy, aging, and exercise cause our bodies to go through cycles of change.

Take care of your lingerie drawer like you would a garden. Just like flowers, some bras may no longer fit. Keep your collection vibrant by weeding out old ones and making room for fresh ones.

So, this Saturday, let's celebrate National Give Something Away Day by handing out any doubts about your bra and giving yourself these 6 items that surely have your size, plus 0-shipping-charge on every checkout!
Sandra

Hello {{first_name}}, 

Did you know that over 3.8 million women are suffering from breast cancer in the United States?  

It's sometimes hard to detect illnesses related to breasts. But it's possible for us to take good care of our girls.

These are 7 common mistakes we should steer clear of for better breast health: 

​1. Wearing the wrong bra size
2. Getting nipples piercings done
3. Waxing nipple hair
4. Clutching or pinching the breast
5. Smoking
6. Sleeping on your tummy 
7. Jogging or running without the right support

The bonus is that, with proper care, your breasts can make you look youthful and attractive. 
Cheers,
Sandra

🌈 {{first_name}}, 4 tips to stay lucky this St. Patrick's Day...
St. Patrick's Day: tông màu xanh lá, cỏ 3 lá và cầu vồng

St. Patrick's Day is around the corner! Stay ready to celebrate Irish culture and have a good time! However, finding the right outfit can be difficult, especially for your bra. Don't worry, though; we've got you covered. We'll help you find the right bra to make you feel comfortable, stylish, and unique.

Whether you're going out for a parade or attending a Pub Crawl with your friends, we have some tips and facts to help you pick out the correct bra. Consider material, fit, and shape for good result.

1. Wearing Green is a Must!
Green is the official color of St. Patrick's Day, and Jumpchic - Flowy Jumpsuit with Pockets is a nice choice. For bras, go for light and airy styles in green or white. If you don't like green bras, Lazilayer's Layering Shirt Extender is a nifty alternative.

2. Say Yes to Plunge Bras
Plunge bras are ideal for low-cut tops and dresses, as they give subtle cleavage while providing support. They also create a longer torso illusion, making you look taller and slimmer.

3. Strappy Bras for Fun
St. Patrick's Day is a day for fun and festivities. Show your style with unique strappy designs, lace, or mesh cut-outs. Try the green CushyCurves or BreezyBloom Bra for a peek-a-boo effect to make you stand out.

4. Accessories Make a Difference
Details matter! Try adding pops of green with bra straps, or go for a backless one with a fun design. For added sparkle on your special day, opt for green embellishments like beads or sequins.

5. Comfort is Key
To ensure comfort and confidence, pick a bra that fits well. You don't want anything poking, pinching, or riding up. At Bra Goddess, we have a range of bras that cater to different needs, sizes, and shapes.

We hope these tips and facts will help you choose the ideal bra for your St. Patrick's Day outfit. Don't forget to visit Bra Goddess during this weekend for a huge saving!

Happy St. Patrick's Day!
Sandra

Easter is approaching and there's lots to plan, from family gatherings to the appropriate outfit. I understand picking the right bra is just as important for feeling comfortable and confident.

That’s why I wanted to share some of our top tips and tricks with you. Let's find something supportive and comfortable that give you a boost of confidence.

Tip #1: Know Your Size 
Many people wear the wrong bra size, as our bodies change with age. To ensure comfort and support, have yours measured by a fitting specialist.

Tip #2: Comfort is Essential 
Comfort is key. Opt for a soft-cup or wireless bra for comfortable support.

Tip #3: Think about Your Outfit 
Selecting a bra should depend on your outfit. A white dress needs a nude bra, while sheer fabrics require a seamless bra.

Tip #4: Don't forget your shoes!
Heeled sandals & wedges flatter many outfits, while pumps can be stylish too. Remember to pack some pairs of socks for outdoor fun!

Ready to make Easter special this year? I'm willing to help. Reach out if needed. Wishing you a joyous holiday!

Sandra

8 outfit tricks to spring into styles!

Hey {{first_name}}!

As spring approaches, it's time to ditch those heavy sweaters and welcome colorful blouses and dresses. To ensure that you feel confident, I have many ideas on stylish and comfortable bras. These are some must-haves:

1. A convertible bra—Versatility is key in warmer weather. Convertible bras give you many options: classic straps, halters, crossed or strapless. Endless choices!
2. A lightweight option—For active days or humid weather, invest in lightweight fabrics like cotton or merino wool for comfort and support without added weight. This invisible gathering bra may help.
3. A bright pop of color—nothing says "spring" more than vibrant colors! Brighten up your lingerie drawer with fun hues to rock the sunny season. Glamorette may be a nice pick!
4. Strappy add-ons—This season's trends feature lacy details and unique straps for a stylish boost. Elevate any outfit with one of these statement pieces, such as Starry Bra.

We also have some tips and tricks for choosing the right outfit to complement your bra:
1. Layering is key. A cardigan or denim jacket can add dimension to an outfit. A Jumpsuit is also a popular choice.
2. Pastels and bold prints are in. Try mix and match for a stylish look.
3. Light denim is a spring staple. Pair it with a blouse and jewelry for a chic ensemble.
4. Comfy shoes like sneakers or flats are ideal for long walks in the park.
I hope this guide has helped you to welcome spring with enthusiasm. Visit our store for the latest collection and style tips.
Best regards

🎁{{first_name}}’s Burning Bra FAQs: Solved!

Good day, {{first_name}}! 

We recently had the honor of sitting down with Wendy Nguyen - a fashion influencer known for her impeccable style. She graciously shared her personal experiences about bras. Learn from her expertise and find answers to your burning bra questions!

❓ How is a bra supposed to fit?
The right bra will make you feel supported without the pain of thick wires and hooks. Wendy recommended five areas that you can always review to verify if your bra is fitting: your band, straps, cups, underwire and center gore.

❓ How often should I replace my bra?
On average, we should replace bras every 6-9 months. Also, consider signs such as bent underwire, frayed fabric, stretched-out straps or a change in body shape.

❓ How should I wash my bras?
It's best to hand-wash bras using mild detergent or use a lingerie bag when machine washing. Always fasten the hooks and evade twisting the bras. Air drying is preferable.

We hope you’ve found answers to your most frequent bra-blems. Visit BraGoddess to discover more "feel naked but better" bras!

Cheers, 
Sandra

👀 Guilty of these Bra Oopsies, {{first_name}}?!

Hi lovely {{first_name}}!

While wearing a bra seems like a routine task, there are some most common mistakes many women’re making without realizing it. See it for yourself 👇

❗ Not adjusting the straps
Remember to adjust the bra straps to the correct length. Straps that are too loose or too tight can affect the fit and support of the bra.

❗ Wearing the same bra every day
Have at least three bras in your wardrobe: one to wear, one to wash, and one to rest for a day. 

❗ Neglecting to replace old bras
Bras lose their elasticity over time, so it's crucial to replace them regularly. 

❗ Wearing a White Bra Under White Clothing
The key to looking polished when wearing light fabrics is to ensure your bra match your skin tone. Light nude, soft tan, mocha, or black – to blend in with grace.

By keeping these common mistakes in mind, you can maximize the benefits of your bras. Stay tuned for more useful bra-related information! 

Cheers,
Sandra

Hey {{first_name}}! 

I hope this message finds you well, especially after the recent Hurricane Helene. My heart goes out to everyone affected in the Southeast. If you're in the area, please know we're thinking of you and hoping for a swift recovery.

October always reminds me of my grandmother's birthday. She'd celebrate by baking her famous apple pie and inviting the whole family over. The house would smell of cinnamon and love. It's these warm memories that inspired our October Birthday Celebration.

Whether it's your birthday month or not, I believe we all deserve a little comfort and pampering, especially in trying times. Remember those soft, cozy pajamas that make you feel wrapped in a hug? Or that perfect-fitting bra that lets you forget you're even wearing one? That's the feeling we want to bring you.

I know Hurricane Helene has hit hard, especially in the southeast. My heart aches for everyone impacted, and I just wanted to take a moment to let you know that we’re here for you. Whether you’re recovering from the storm or simply need a little bit of comfort, I want you to feel that same sense of warmth and security that October can bring.

Over at our store, we’re doing our part to lift your spirits. Everything is still 50% off, and you’ll get free shipping on orders over $44.95. It’s my small way of saying "you matter," and I hope it brings a bit of brightness to your day, even if it’s just treating yourself to something cozy and beautiful.

Maybe you're planning a quiet evening with a good book, or perhaps you're finally visiting those grandkids. Whatever your plans, we want you to feel your best. Comfortable, confident, and ready for whatever life brings.

If you haven't visited us in a while, we've missed you! We've added some new styles I think you'll love - all designed with your comfort in mind. And if you've shopped with us recently, thank you! Your support means the world to us.

Remember, you don't need a special occasion to treat yourself. Sometimes, just making it through the day is worth celebrating.

Take care and stay safe,
Sandra

How are you? I just wanted to check in and share something special—especially after the rough ice storms many of us have faced lately. With flu and measles going around too, I know a lot of us have been bundled up indoors, waiting for spring to show her face.

Well, she’s finally here 🌸 And with her comes our Spring Blossom Collection—a celebration of strength, comfort, and you.

This April, our Daisy Bra was voted Customers’ Choice—for good reason. The front buttons are a blessing for sore shoulders, and the gentle lift helps you stand tall without wires poking. April from Minnesota told us, “After the storm, this bra brought back a little sunshine.” She’s 68 and swears it’s the best $25 she’s spent this year.

Now, here's the best part: we're offering a store-wide discount of 50 to 85% off on all our products, including the Daisy Bra and the spring blossom collection. Plus, get free shipping on any order over $39. No need for any code, and there are no exclusions. This is our way of saying thank you for being our valued customer.

Our Spring Blossom Collection couldn't come at a better time. While the cherry blossoms are making their debut across the country, many of us are still recovering from power outages or fighting off that stubborn flu going around. That's why I made sure every piece features:

Extra-soft fabrics that won't irritate sensitive skin
Wide, non-dig straps that prevent shoulder pain
Moisture-wicking materials (essential during those hot flashes!)
Front closures for easy dressing even with limited mobility

Here's a helpful tip: During unexpected outages, having the right undergarments makes all the difference. Mabel (71) discovered this when she stayed comfortable through a 16-hour blackout in her Senobra!

I know that as we age, comfort becomes more important than ever. That's why we've designed our products to be both comfortable and stylish. The Daisy Bra is a great example of that – it's easy to put on and take off, and it's made from soft cotton blend that's gentle on your skin.

If you’re tired of digging straps, slipping bands, or that tight pinch, now’s the time. From wire-free support to tummy control pants that smooth without squeezing, we’ve curated styles that fit your life—not the other way around.

I'm clearing inventory for summer styles, so everything is 50-85% OFF storewide with FREE shipping on orders over $39 – no code needed, no exclusions. But I can only hold these prices until Sunday.

Barbara (69) told me her granddaughter thought she'd lost 10 pounds when she wore her ExSecret bra! Who wouldn't want those compliments at our upcoming family gatherings?

Hello {{first_name}},

I hope you’re staying safe and warm, especially with Hurricane Milton making its way through. It’s times like these when we need to focus on comfort and care, not just for ourselves but for those we love. 

With the weather outside being unpredictable, it’s even more important to feel good in what we wear, especially when we’re staying indoors or bundling up for chilly days ahead. I’ve been hearing from so many women like you about how they’ve found their perfect bra for these cooler months.

You see, whether it’s cozy nights by the fire or getting together with family, there’s nothing quite like feeling comfortable and confident in what you wear underneath it all. Just last week, I heard from Dolores, who loves our Lush Fitting Bra. She wore it to her family holiday dinner and said it kept her comfortable all night, even under her favorite sweater. *“It felt like I wasn’t wearing anything at all,”* she told me. Isn’t that the best kind of feeling?

Margaret, another lovely customer, shared how our Airy Lace was her saving grace for morning walks in the brisk winter air. She pairs it under her favorite flannel, and it keeps her warm and snug without feeling bulky. And then there’s Mildred, who wore our Breezy Push to a holiday party and felt like a million bucks. Just a touch of sparkle can make you feel beautiful, can’t it?

That's why I wanted to reach out today. As we head into the cooler months, I've put together a special collection just for us. Bras that understand our need for comfort without sacrificing a bit of elegance. Pieces that work with our bodies, not against them – whether we're baking pies for the grandkids or dressing up for holiday parties.

We all deserve a little comfort and confidence in our lives, and that’s why I wanted to share these stories with you. Right now, we’re offering 50% OFF on select bras, and to make it even easier, free shipping on orders over $44.95. Whether it’s a little treat for yourself or a thoughtful gift for someone special, now’s the perfect time to find something that feels just right.

Why not treat yourself to something that makes you feel wonderful? Or perhaps pick up a thoughtful gift for a friend who could use a little extra comfort?
Remember, you're beautiful, you're valued, and you deserve to feel amazing – no matter what the calendar says.

With warmth and care,
Sandra

Your Quick Guide to Intimate Apparel: Styles & Care Tips

Choosing the Right Fit

Measure Regularly: Ensure accurate sizing by measuring bust, waist, and hips periodically.
Match to Outfit: Select styles that complement your clothing and provide desired support.

Care Essentials

Gentle Washing: Hand wash with mild detergent to maintain fabric quality.
Proper Drying: Air dry to preserve elasticity and shape.
Organized Storage: Store items to retain their form and longevity.
